reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the adapter contract claim covered by review packet construction, review prompt input propagation, and rendered prompt path visibility tests.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names review-prompt routing and shared compare-output path behavior, which can be proven by deterministic packet and renderer tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by review packet construction collecting the compare artifact path, comparison questions, and human review prompts into one packet; review prompt input preserving the artifact path and human review lens; and rendered review prompts exposing the same compare artifact path and compare summary.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep adapter compare artifact path, comparison questions, and human review prompts on the same review packet and rendered prompt boundary when review prompt surfaces change.
